documentation.description:
This package contains the routines for supporting the Image attribute for
ordinary fixed point types up to 64-bit small and mantissa.

subprograms.name: Image_Fixed64
Set_Image_Fixed64

generic_instantiations.name: Impl
generic_instantiations.code: package Impl is new Image_F (Int64, Uns64, Arith_64.Scaled_Divide64);
